I can schedule that. Quick note: 10:00–11:00 on 2024-05-19 is already booked (Project Kick-off), and there’s a One-on-One 11:00–11:30, so 10:00 is not available.

- 09:00–10:00 (before the kickoff)
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your one‑on‑one)
- I can also pick another time that afternoon if you prefer (please state a time range).

Before I create the event, please confirm or provide:
1. Preferred alternative slot from the three options above (or a specific time range). If you want me to pick, I’ll schedule the earliest available (11:30–12:30).
2. Title for the meeting (default: "Follow-up Meeting").

4. Participant emails to invite (none by default except your calendar email will be included).
5. Location (optional; e.g., "Office 44A" or "Zoom").

Tell me your choices and I’ll create the event.
